config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society’s interests matter a lot, but they should not automatically come before individual rights, because that can easily be abused by governments or majorities. In my view, rights like free speech, due process, and personal dignity are the basic limits that keep society fair. From my perspective, a good society protects people first, then asks them to contribute to the common good within those protections.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu secara umum. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kita justru menunjukkan bahwa ketika mayoritas atau pemerintah diberi terlalu banyak ruang atas nama “kepentingan umum,” kebebasan sipil mudah tergerus, terutama bagi kelompok yang tidak populer. Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar seperti kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum yang adil, dan martabat pribadi. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang menekan individu demi efisiensi, melainkan yang melindungi hak individu lalu membangun kebaikan bersama di atas perlindungan itu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should automatically outrank the individual, because in Indonesia we have seen how “the common good” can be used to silence criticism, excuse corruption, or pressure minorities. At the same time, I also do not believe rights are a license to ignore other people, because our culture values gotong royong and social responsibility, not pure individualism. The right balance is to protect core individual rights first, then limit them only when there is a clear, necessary, and fair public reason. If society is allowed to override rights too easily, the result is usually not a stronger community but a more obedient one.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum, karena di pengalaman Amerika saya, “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu sering dipakai sebagai alasan untuk membungkam minoritas atau memperluas kuasa negara. Poin tentang gotong royong dan tanggung jawab sosial memang penting, tetapi itu tidak membuktikan bahwa hak individu harus berada di bawah masyarakat; justru hak-hak dasar adalah pagar agar kerja sama sosial tidak berubah jadi pemaksaan. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang kuat bukan yang paling mudah mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang paling disiplin membatasi dirinya sendiri saat berhadapan dengan kebebasan warga. Kalau ada pembatasan, itu harus sangat sempit, jelas, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan karena mayoritas merasa lebih nyaman.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual, because in Indonesia I have seen how easily “public interest” can become a slogan for silencing criticism or pressuring minorities. Gotong royong matters, but it should not be twisted into a demand for obedience; social duty is important only when individual rights are still protected as the baseline. I do not accept the idea that a strong society is one that can sacrifice people most easily — a strong society is one that can justify any limit on rights clearly, narrowly, and fairly. If society can override individuals too freely, then what it usually builds is not harmony, but conformity.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak tegas gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan secara umum di atas hak individu. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah politik kita menunjukkan bahwa alasan “demi kepentingan umum” sering dipakai untuk membungkam minoritas dan memperluas kekuasaan negara, jadi saya tidak percaya pada prioritas otomatis seperti itu. Gotong royong dan tanggung jawab sosial memang penting, tetapi justru hak dasar adalah pagar agar kerja sama tidak berubah menjadi pemaksaan. Kalau ada pembatasan hak, itu harus sangat sempit, jelas, dan dapat dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan sekadar karena mayoritas merasa lebih nyaman.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
